query: UPDATE pubkeys SET status = 'fetched', applied_event_id = $2, applied_created_at = $3, last_fetched_at = now(), last_confirmed_at = now(), fetch_count = fetch_count + 1, last_changed_at = CASE WHEN $4 THEN now() ELSE last_changed_at END, change_count = change_count + CASE WHEN $4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE id = $1
